title: bersama abyssinica subsp. engleriana
intro: Bersama abyssinica subsp. engleriana, also known as the Engler's bersama or Ethiopian bersama, is a subspecies of the Bersama abyssinica plant, a flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to tropical Africa, particularly in Ethiopia, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Bersama abyssinica subsp. engleriana has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create ointments and salves for various health conditions.
